name: OrbStack
description: OrbStack — Fast macOS container and Linux VM runtime replacing Docker Desktop with lower memory and CPU footprint.

seo.title: OrbStack — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: OrbStack: OrbStack — Fast macOS container and Linux VM runtime replacing Docker Desktop with lower memory and CPU footprint.

when_to_use: Fast macOS Docker Desktop replacement with lower memory usage
Running Linux VMs on Apple Silicon with sub-second startup
Docker and containerd on macOS without heavy virtualization
Running x86 containers on M1/M2 Macs with Rosetta emulation
Lightweight local dev environment for container-based apps

review.verdict: Easily the best Docker replacement on macOS today, the only downside is that it's Mac-only.
review.best_for: macOS developers tired of Docker Desktop's performance and memory problems
review.not_for: Windows or Linux developers, or teams needing strict Docker Desktop parity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
